n: Lord and Lady of the Golden Wood

steps.t: Lord Celeborn and Lady Galadriel can be found outside their house, high atop the greatest mallorn in Lothlórien. The carpeted path near Forbad winds u…
Forbad is at the base of the carpeted path that climbs the mallorn to the House of Celeborn. You have spoken with Lord Celeborn and Lady Galadriel and…
